raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad nu Dahwida Laiks
natnauze/ ka tam bij no-
mirt/ tad pawehleja
wiꞥſch fawam Dehłam Sala-
manam/ un fazzija:"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es eemu wiﬀas Pafaules
Zettu. Tapehz nemmees drohschu
Prahtu/ un turrajs ka Wihrs/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un turrajs pee tahs Sar-
gafchanas ta KUNGA tawa
Deewa/ staigadams eekſch wiꞥſch
na Zetteein/ turredains winna
Likkumus/ winna Bauslus/ un
winna Teefas/ un winna Leezi-
bas/ ittin ka Mohsus Bauſlibā
rakstihts irr/ ka tu warr gudri
turretees eekſch wiﬀa/ ko tu dar-
rifi/ un wiﬀur kurp tu greesifees."
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz ka tas KUNGS
tawu Wahrdu apſtiprina/ ko tas
us man ter runnajs/ fazzidams:
Ja tawi Dehli fawu Zettu far-
gahs/ staigadami preekſch manna
Waiga veetizzigi ar wiﬀu fawu
Sirdi/ un ar wiﬀu fawu Dweh-
feli/ tad/ fazzija wiꞥſch/ tew ne
truhks Wihrs/ kas us Israēta
Gohda-Krehflu fehdehs."
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tu arri gann jinut/ ko
abs Jerujas Dehls man ter d
rijs/ un ko wiꞥſch teem divi k
ka Leel-Kungeem Israēta/ Al
ram Nera Dehłam/ un Ama
Jetera Dehłam darrijs/ un t
nokawis/ un irr Karza A
Meera Laika islehjis/ un irr k
ka Affini pee fawu Johstu liž
kas apkahrt faweem Burne
un pee fawahm Kurpehm /
pee winna Rahjahm bija."
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz darri pehz tan
Gndribas/ ka tu winna firu
Mattus ne leez ar Meeru K
pā nahkt."
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Barfillaja ta Gi
ditera Dehleem bnhg tew
darriht/ ka tee starp teem irr/
pee tawa Galda ehd/ jo ta
rejahs tee pee mannis/ ka
preekſch tawn Brahti Absal
behdsu."
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un rangi/ pee tew irr
mejus Gera Dehls/ tas D
Jemini no Bakuriin/ kas m
lahDeja ar breeﬁnigu Lahdes
nu/ tai Deenā/ kad es us �
anaim gahju. Bet wiꞥſch
nahze man pretti pee Jarda
un es efiru winnam pee ta KL
GA swehrejs/ fazzidams:
tew ar Sohbinu ne kaufchu."
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tu ne turri winnu
noseedsigu/ jo tu effi gu
Wihrs/ un gann finnafi/ ko
winnam bubsdarriht/ katu n
na firmus Mattus ar Affi
leezt Bedre nahkt."
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta aismigge Dahw"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
